name: Trade Flow Exhaustion into Ask Wall Reversal
hypothesis: A large positive signed trade imbalance (buyer-initiated flow) into a large, concentrated ask wall signals buyer exhaustion and absorption by sellers. This combination should predict a price reversal (down-move), thus it is a contra-directional signal.
mutation_note: Novel signal combining two Block C primitives to test a specific microstructure reversal hypothesis (exhaustion into absorption).
